subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the Fire that flameth in the Divine Tree! Well done, well done, O thou who dost voice His praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اشتعل بالنار الموقده فی السدره الربانیه بخ بخ لک یا ایها الناطق بالثناء
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
